Original: A Leader can be Friends with other Leaders, which affects their behavior towards them. Being nice to a Leader's friends can improve your relationship with the Leader, while being mean to them can hurt it.
Translation: 领袖可以与其他领袖成为朋友，这会影响他们彼此的态度。善待某位领袖的朋友可改善你与该领袖的关系；苛待他们则会伤害关系。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog diplomacy screen text.

Original: A Leader can be Friends with other Leaders, which affects their behavior towards them. Being nice to a Leader's friends can improve your relationship with the Leader, while being mean to them can hurt it.
Translation: 领袖可以与其他领袖成为朋友，这会影响他们彼此的态度。善待某位领袖的朋友可改善你与该领袖的关系；苛待他们则会伤害关系。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog diplomacy screen text.

Original: A Leader can be Enemies with other Leaders, which affects their behavior towards them. Being nice to a Leader's enemies can hurt your relationship with the Leader, while being mean to them can help improve it.
Translation: 领袖可以与其他领袖成为敌人，这会影响他们彼此的态度。善待某位领袖的敌人会伤害你与该领袖的关系；苛待他们则可能改善关系。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog diplomacy screen text.

Original: A Leader can be Enemies with other Leaders, which affects their behavior towards them. Being nice to a Leader's enemies can hurt your relationship with the Leader, while being mean to them can help improve it.
Translation: 领袖可以与其他领袖成为敌人，这会影响他们彼此的态度。善待某位领袖的敌人会伤害你与该领袖的关系；苛待他们则可能改善关系。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog diplomacy screen text.

Original: [Relationship Level|RL] is how much this Leader likes you. A higher Relationship Level score makes him more likely to work with and aid you. Unlike [Influence|INFLUENCE] it is a fixed value based on past decisions you've made.
Translation: [关系等级|RL]表示这位领袖对你的好感。关系等级越高，他越可能与你合作并提供援助。不同于[影响力|INFLUENCE]，它是基于你过去决策的固定数值。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog diplomacy tooltip preserving concept IDs.

Original: [Relationship Level|RL] is how much this Leader likes you. A higher Relationship Level score makes him more likely to work with and aid you. Unlike [Influence|INFLUENCE] it is a fixed value based on past decisions you've made.
Translation: [关系等级|RL]表示这位领袖对你的好感。关系等级越高，他越可能与你合作并提供援助。不同于[影响力|INFLUENCE]，它是基于你过去决策的固定数值。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog diplomacy tooltip preserving concept IDs.

Original: [Influence|INFLUENCE] is the current amount of 'diplomatic currency' you have to spend with this Leader. Unlike [Relationship Level|RL] it is spent and then disappears.
Translation: [影响力|INFLUENCE]是你当前可用于这位领袖的“外交货币”。不同于[关系等级|RL]，它会在花费后消失。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog diplomacy tooltip preserving concept IDs.

Original: [Influence|INFLUENCE] is the current amount of 'diplomatic currency' you have to spend with this Leader. Unlike [Relationship Level|RL] it is spent and then disappears.
Translation: [影响力|INFLUENCE]是你当前可用于这位领袖的“外交货币”。不同于[关系等级|RL]，它会在花费后消失。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog diplomacy tooltip preserving concept IDs.

Original: [Reputation|REPUTATION] is your global 'diplomatic currency' earned in special situations (e.g. refusing a Demand made by another Leader).
Translation: [声誉|REPUTATION]是你的全局“外交货币”，可在特殊情境中获得，例如拒绝另一位领袖的要求。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog diplomacy tooltip preserving concept ID.

Original: [Reputation|REPUTATION] is your global 'diplomatic currency' earned in special situations (e.g. refusing a Demand made by another Leader).
Translation: [声誉|REPUTATION]是你的全局“外交货币”，可在特殊情境中获得，例如拒绝另一位领袖的要求。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog diplomacy tooltip preserving concept ID.

Original: [Leverage|LEVERAGE] is the total amount of 'diplomatic currency' you have to spend with this Leader, right now.
Translation: [筹码|LEVERAGE]是你眼下可用于这位领袖的“外交货币”总量。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog diplomacy tooltip preserving concept ID.
